'''Mahk'khar''' was a [[Gotal/Legends|Gotal]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] who built a three-story castle on [[Tuulab]].
In exchange for [[Meela]]—the daughter of an archaeology professor named [[Oron]]—and 10,000 credits, he handed over the [[Kashi Mer talisman]] to the [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Durrei]].

{{Char-stub}}
